productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Boy Check Purple Shirt
description: Composition Purple and white checked shirt, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, tipped white collar, white tape detailing on the shoulders, buttoned front placket, patch pocket with one buttoned flap on either side of the chest, yoke at the back, stitch detailing, graphic print on the left chest and back and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Let your little boy learn to play Basketball in style with this checked shirt from doodle. Teach him the game and sporting spirit, while the cotton fabric keeps him fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with shorts and sports shoes for an even more sporty look.
